Touch this file (commit any change to it) to trigger a DRY-RUN of the
backfill-per-contract.yml workflow. The workflow runs against prod DB
but writes nothing — output is posted to Telegram and visible in the
GitHub Actions UI.

Useful when the user is off-laptop and needs to preview backfill output
on their phone.

Last triggered: 2026-05-19T16:30Z — claude
